narrative:
New Albany-G (precinct in Franklin County) has 862 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
